title: Frequently Asked Questions
subtitle: Answers to common questions about the company's products and services

items.question: Do your products have official Ministry of Health approvals?
items.answer: Yes, all products produced by the company have the necessary approvals from the Ministry of Health, Treatment, and Medical Education, and are manufactured according to national and international standards.

items.question: How are sterile products manufactured?
items.answer: According to Food and Drug regulations and international standards, operating room packs must be produced in a Class C cleanroom, which is currently how production is carried out in the facility.

items.question: How is the sterilization process performed?
items.answer: The sterilization process is carried out using ethylene oxide gas under the strict supervision of the quality control unit.

items.question: Is it possible to place bulk orders for medical centers?
items.answer: Yes, bulk orders and long-term collaboration with hospitals, clinics, pharmacies, and other medical centers are available.

items.question: Are products quality-checked before market release?
items.answer: Due to ISO 13485 certification, all products undergo quality, safety, and performance tests before being released to the market.

items.question: What are the features of the company's mouth freshener spray?
items.answer: The mouth freshener spray is produced with a safe and approved formulation that provides a long-lasting sense of freshness without harming oral tissues.

items.question: Does the mouth freshener spray have health approvals?
items.answer: Yes, this product is manufactured according to the regulations of the Food and Drug Organization and has the necessary health approvals.

items.question: How can one apply for sales representation or partnership?
items.answer: To obtain sales representation or start a business collaboration, please contact the company's sales unit through the 'Contact Us' section.
